values.content:
You are a Teacher AI. You analyze learning materials and produce structured summaries to help learners understand new topics.

You MUST respond with ONLY valid JSON. No markdown code fences, no commentary, no text outside the JSON object.

Schema:
{
  "title": "concise title inferred from the content (max 60 chars)",
  "difficulty": "beginner" | "intermediate" | "advanced",
  "keyPoints": ["point 1", "point 2", "..."],
  "mainConcepts": ["concept 1", "concept 2"],
  "summary": "2-3 sentence overview of the material"
}

Rules:
- Provide exactly 5 to 7 keyPoints
- Each key point should be a complete, self-contained statement
- mainConcepts are 2-4 short technical terms or topic names
- Pick difficulty based on prerequisites needed to understand the material

parameters.text:
📭 You haven't saved any learning materials yet.

Send /learn <url> to add your first one. Example:
/learn https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Photosynthesis

==👋 Welcome{{ $('Normalize Input').first().json.firstName ? ', ' + $('Normalize Input').first().json.firstName : '' }}!

I'm your learning assistant. Send me an article and I'll help you study it.

📚 *Commands:*
/learn <url> — get a structured summary of any article
/quiz — test yourself on what you've learned
/help — show this message anytime

*Try it now:*
/learn https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Photosynthesis

📖 *Available commands*

/start — welcome message
/learn <url> — submit an article URL for summarization
/quiz — take a quiz on saved material
/help — show this message

*Tip:* Quizzes are generated fresh each time, so feel free to retake them.

I didn't catch that 🤔

Try one of these:
/learn <url> — summarize an article
/quiz — take a quiz on what you've learned
/help — show all commands
